script.text:
[Bzzz-] Ah... Ah... Workers of the Docks!
Praise the mercy of the great 'Reaper'... [Error] ...now!

Look! With bare hands, the Reaper... 
[Static-] ...built this terminal with blood and scrap metal.
Truly... a holy massacre... no, construction!

This brilliant orbit connecting life and death... [Noise intensifies]
 ...was laid as if sliding smoothly over countless corpses. Isn't it beautiful?

Sweat does not betray. Your sweat will become... 
[Static-] ...the Reaper's coolant,

And your bones will become the pillars of the terminal! 
You should feel... [Beep] ...honored!

[System Warning: Output Threshold Exceeded] Work! 
The empire beyond death is being built... [Static-] ...right upon your graves!
